title: Your Bangalore golf map — and what happens next
microFact: Home base Clover Greens, rotation partners Zion Hills, Eagleton, Prestige Golfshire, KGA. Goal: BMW Golf Cup Category B.
lesson:
Eight weeks of bytes — here's your territory and your ladder.

YOUR COURSES: CLOVER GREENS (Hosur Rd) — your 18-hole home; learn it deeply, one course known well is worth five known barely. ZION HILLS (Kolar) — beginner-friendly, great confidence builder. EAGLETON (Bidadi) — classic resort track, easy pay-and-play. PRESTIGE GOLFSHIRE (Nandi Hills) — Bangalore's glamour course; book it as your monthly 'measuring stick'. KGA — the members' institution; go as a guest when invited, and be the guest who gets re-invited. BANGALORE GOLF CLUB — heritage, old-money, tight fairways.

YOUR LADDER: (1) IGU WHS Index established — done or imminent if you followed byte 39. (2) Index under 28 → BMW GOLF CUP Category B eligible, Bengaluru qualifier — THE year-one target. (3) Monthly 4moles/corporate Stablefords for reps and network. (4) Index under 20 → most corporate opens. (5) Under 12 → Category A and IGU amateur events.

YOU'VE FINISHED the core curriculum. Export your progress (Stats tab) and run your CLI agent per AGENTS.md — it will build your next bytes around whatever your quiz stats say you're weakest at. See you on the tee. Fore please — Amit, now driving.

quiz.question: What's the realistic year-one competition target on your ladder?
quiz.explanation: Category B takes handicaps to 28 — attainable within months of honest posting. The rest come as the Index falls.
